title: Bitdeer Q1 2026 Revenue Surges 169% but Misses EPS Estimates
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ:BTDR) Q1 2026 results showed strong revenue growth but earnings disappointment. Revenue surged 169% year-over-year to $188.9 million, exceeding analyst expectations of $187.3 million. However, the company reported adjusted EPS loss of ($0.46) compared to expected loss of ($0.37), missing earnings estimates by ($0.09). The stock declined 11.4% following the announcement as investors focused on the earnings miss. Key drivers of revenue outperformance included strong Bitcoin mining production and rapid AI Cloud ARR growth reaching $69 million. However, earnings were pressured by negative gross margins reflecting low Bitcoin prices, $70 million in mining rig depreciation charges, and seasonal power costs from expanded operations in Norway. Management expects margin recovery through SEALMINER A4 deployment improving mining efficiency, seasonal power cost normalization, and AI Cloud service scaling. The company's AI Cloud services transition is accelerating, with ARR growing from $10 million in January to $69 million by April. Q1 2026 results suggest Bitdeer is executing successfully on its AI transition strategy despite near-term earnings headwinds.
